title: Ayo (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ayo''' can refer to several things:

=='''[[Canon]]'''==
*'''[[Ayo Bons]]''', a criminal apart of the [[Black Mask]]
*'''[[Ayo Bons' species]]''', the species of [[Ayo Bons]]
*'''[[Ayo Tam]]''', an [[alien]] who was present on [[Tatooine]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|'''Legends''']]==
*'''[[Ayo Morota]]''', a criminal who led the [[Red Hand]]

{{Disambig}}
